questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to Inter-Process Communication (IPC)?
options: Inefficient scaling of Shared memory arrays, Message passing, Pipes, and Sockets buffers.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of Shared memory arrays, Message passing, Pipes, and Sockets buffers.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how Shared memory arrays, Message passing, Pipes, and Sockets buffers scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
